name: hcc-ckd-suspect
description: CKD suspect: surfaces a protocol card for patients with two or more elevated eGFR values (<60 ml/min) over the last two years and no active kidney disease condition on the problem list.

protocols.description: Recommends adding a kidney-related diagnosis for patients with two or more eGFR values < 60 ml/min in the last two years and no active CKD condition.

meta.title: CKD suspect
meta.description: All patients with evidence of two or more elevated eGFR values and no active CKD problem on the Conditions List.
